title: astragalus lentiginosus var. cornutus
intro: Astragalus lentiginosus var. cornutus, also known as the stickseed, is a perennial plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. The health benefits associated with Astragalus lentiginosus var. cornutus include enhanced immune function, improved cardiovascular health, and reduced stress levels. Astragalus lentiginosus var. cornutus can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to create a blend that promotes overall well-being.
